optionsDescription: Start with one UUID, then switch to batch mode when you need a list.
modeDescription: Single mode keeps the output focused; batch mode unlocks the count setting.
countDescription: Batch mode can generate 2 to 100 UUIDs at a time.
macAddressDescription: A locally administered random address is used by default so real hardware addresses are not exposed.
clockSequenceDescription: A 14-bit value used with the timestamp to avoid collisions.
macAddressInvalid: Use 12 hexadecimal digits, with optional separators.
resultsDescription: UUID v1 values generated locally for the selected mode and node settings.
resultsPlaceholder: Generated UUID v1 values will appear here...
